about.title: About us
terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.intro: These Terms of Service ("Terms") govern your access to and use of Bloomie, an AI-powered skin analysis and personalized skincare platform. By creating an account or using our services, you agree to these Terms.
terms.s1.title: 1. Acceptance of the Terms
terms.s1.body: By registering for and using Bloomie, you agree to these Terms of Service. If you do not agree, you must not use the platform. Using Bloomie requires you to be at least 18 years old; if a minor uses the platform, express consent from a parent or legal guardian is required.
terms.s2.title: 2. Description of the Service
terms.s2.body: Bloomie is a digital platform that offers AI-powered skin analysis (Skin Scan), personalized skincare routine recommendations (My Routine), a conversational skincare assistant (AI Assistant), and appointment scheduling with certified dermatologists (Appointments). Bloomie is not a medical service and does not replace an in-person dermatological consultation. Results from Skin Scan and recommendations from the AI Assistant are informational only and must not be interpreted as a definitive clinical diagnosis.
terms.s3.title: 3. User Accounts
terms.s3.body: You are responsible for the accuracy of the information you provide when registering and for keeping your login credentials confidential. Bloomie is not responsible for unauthorized use of an account resulting from a user's failure to safeguard their password.
terms.s4.title: 4. Use of Skin Scan and AI Processing
terms.s4.body: By using the Skin Scan feature, you expressly authorize the capture, upload, and processing of images of your face for the purpose of generating an analysis and personalized recommendations. This consent is independent of your general acceptance of these Terms and may be withdrawn at any time from your account settings, without affecting the validity of processing already carried out.
terms.s5.title: 5. Dermatologist Appointment Service
terms.s5.body: Bloomie acts as a technological intermediary between users and independent, certified dermatologists. The doctor-patient relationship, and any medical act arising from an appointment, is the sole responsibility of the healthcare professional in the exercise of their medical practice.
terms.s6.title: 6. Subscriptions and Payments
terms.s6.body: Subscription payments are processed through Stripe, a third-party payment provider. Bloomie does not store credit or debit card data; this information is handled directly by Stripe under its own security standards (PCI-DSS). Subscriptions renew automatically unless cancelled by the user at least 24 hours before the next billing cycle. Refunds are evaluated on a case-by-case basis in accordance with Peruvian consumer protection regulations.
terms.s7.title: 7. Intellectual Property
terms.s7.body: The software, design, brand, recommendation algorithms, and content generated by Bloomie are the property of the company. Images and data uploaded by users remain their property; Bloomie only obtains a limited license to process them for the purpose of providing the service.
terms.s8.title: 8. Prohibited Conduct
terms.s8.body: It is prohibited to: use the AI Assistant for purposes unrelated to skincare, impersonate third parties, reverse-engineer the platform, scrape data in an automated manner, or attempt to compromise the security of the system.
terms.s9.title: 9. Limitation of Liability
terms.s9.body: Bloomie does not guarantee specific results from AI-generated routines or recommendations. The service is provided "as is" and "as available"; Bloomie is not responsible for interruptions attributable to third-party providers (Stripe, Google Gemini, Microsoft Azure, Open Beauty Facts).
terms.s10.title: 10. Termination
terms.s10.body: Bloomie may suspend or delete an account for breach of these Terms. Users may request deletion of their account and data at any time from their Profile, or by writing to support@bloomie.app.
terms.s11.title: 11. Governing Law
terms.s11.body: These Terms are governed by the laws of the Republic of Peru. Any dispute shall be submitted to the competent courts of Lima, Peru.
terms.s12.title: 12. Changes to these Terms
terms.s12.body: Bloomie may update these Terms. Users will be notified by email or through a notice within the platform at least 15 days before the changes take effect.
privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: This Privacy Policy explains how Bloomie collects, uses, and protects your personal data — including sensitive health and biometric information — when you use our platform.
privacy.s1.title: 1. Legal Framework
privacy.s1.body: This Privacy Policy is governed by Law No. 29733, the Peruvian Personal Data Protection Law, and its Regulations (Supreme Decree No. 003-2013-JUS). Given the sensitive nature of the health data and biometric images processed by the platform, Bloomie additionally applies reinforced consent practices aligned with international standards such as the GDPR.
privacy.s2.title: 2. Data We Collect
privacy.s2.table: CategoryExamplesAccount dataName, email address, date of birth, password (encrypted)Biometric and health data (sensitive)Facial photographs captured in Skin Scan, skin analysis results, routine historyAppointment dataDate, time, assigned dermatologist, reason for consultationPayment dataSubscription and billing history (card data is handled by Stripe, not Bloomie)AI interactionsConversations with the AI AssistantTechnical dataIP address, device information, browsing cookies (Landing Page)
privacy.s3.title: 3. Purpose of Processing
privacy.s3.body: We use your data to: (a) generate skin analysis and personalized recommendations, (b) manage appointments with dermatologists, (c) process payments and subscriptions, (d) improve our recommendation models and the service overall, and (e) send service-related communications. If data or images are used to train or improve AI models, this requires separate, specific consent, independent from acceptance of this Policy.
privacy.s4.title: 4. Consent
privacy.s4.body: Processing of sensitive data (facial photographs, health information) requires express, informed, prior, and individualized consent, given through a dedicated checkbox the first time a user uses Skin Scan. This consent may be withdrawn at any time from your account settings, without affecting processing already carried out.
privacy.s5.title: 5. Sharing with Third Parties
privacy.s5.body: Bloomie shares data with the following providers, only to the extent necessary to provide the service:
privacy.s5.list:
• Stripe (payment processing)
  • Google Gemini API (processing AI Assistant conversations)
  • Microsoft Azure (cloud storage and infrastructure)
  • Open Beauty Facts (product catalog, no exchange of users' personal data)
privacy.s5.note: Bloomie does not sell personal data to third parties for advertising purposes.
privacy.s6.title: 6. Storage and Security
privacy.s6.body: Data and images are stored on Microsoft Azure servers with encryption in transit (TLS) and at rest. Skin Scan photographs are retained while the account is active and are permanently deleted within 30 days of account deletion, unless a longer retention period is legally required.
privacy.s7.title: 7. Data Subject Rights (ARCO)
privacy.s7.body: You may exercise your rights of Access, Rectification, Cancellation, and Opposition over your personal data at any time — including deletion of your photographs and history — by writing to privacy@bloomie.app or from the Profile section of the app.
privacy.s8.title: 8. Minors
privacy.s8.body: Bloomie does not knowingly collect data from individuals under 18 without verifiable consent from a parent or legal guardian. Any account belonging to a minor without such authorization will be suspended.
privacy.s9.title: 9. Cookies
privacy.s9.body: The Landing Page uses first-party and third-party cookies (analytics) to improve the user experience. You can manage your cookie preferences from the notice shown when you first enter the site.
privacy.s10.title: 10. International Data Transfers
privacy.s10.body: Since Stripe, Google, and Microsoft Azure may process data outside Peru, Bloomie ensures that such transfers are made only with providers that meet data protection standards equivalent to or higher than those required by Law No. 29733.
privacy.s11.title: 11. Contact
privacy.s11.body: For questions, complaints, or to exercise your ARCO rights, write to privacy@bloomie.app.
privacy.s12.title: 12. Changes to this Policy
privacy.s12.body: Any material change will be communicated to users at least 15 days in advance, by email or through a notice within the platform.

results.subtitle: No marketing. No Photoshop. Metrics from real users who followed their Bloomie routine.
results.stat1: reduced acne marks in less than 8 weeks
results.t1.text: "I spent 4 years trying products without knowing why they didn't work. Bloomie told me exactly what I had and what I needed. In 6 weeks I saw a real difference."
results.t2.text: "What surprised me the most was that it detected hyperpigmentation I hadn't even noticed. The weekly follow-up motivates me to stick to the routine."
results.t3.text: "As a dermatologist, I was skeptical. But the precision of the analysis is impressive. I now recommend Bloomie to patients between consultations."
pricing.subtitle: Three levels for every stage. Start free, scale as you see results.
pricing.starter.name: Starter
pricing.starter.f1: Up to 5 AI skin analyses per month (max. 1 per day)
pricing.starter.f4: AI chatbot for general skin questions
pricing.advanced.name: Advanced
pricing.advanced.f1: Unlimited AI skin analyses (max. 2 per day)
pricing.elite.name: Elite
pricing.elite.f2: AI chatbot with context from your skin profile
pricing.elite.f4: Clinical notes & personalized diagnosis from your dermatologist
pricing.elite.f6: Personalized follow-up reminders on your dashboard
pricing.elite.f7: Priority support dedicated to your account
pricing.note: ✓ No credit card required for the free plan · ✓ Cancel anytime · ✓ 14-day guarantee
about.subtitle: The team behind Bloomie

about.team.title: About the Team
about.team.desc: A behind-the-scenes look at our work process: real team sessions, voice-over narration, and each member sharing their contributions, outcomes, and competencies developed.
